AccoRevit.Addin
Table of Contents

Class MissingResourcesLoader

Namespace
AccoRevit.Addin.Utils
Assembly
AccoRevit.Addin.dll

Detects missing Revit resources (view templates, schedule templates, families, and tag families) and provides helpers to load/copy them from known sources (disk and container models).

public class MissingResourcesLoader
Inheritance
object
MissingResourcesLoader

ReflectionUtils.SetPropertyValue(object, PropertyInfo, object)
SystemExtensions.Cast<T>(object)

Remarks

This class is intended for “bootstrap” workflows where a project model must be aligned to a standard resource set. It can:

  • Compare the active document against predefined resource names.
  • Load missing families from file paths.
  • Copy missing templates/schedules from a container model using copy/paste.

Errors encountered during loading/copying are accumulated and can be displayed at the end of the workflow.

Constructors

MissingResourcesLoader(Document, UIApplication)

Initializes a new instance of the MissingResourcesLoader class.

public MissingResourcesLoader(Document doc, UIApplication uiApp)

Parameters

doc Document

Target document to inspect and populate.

uiApp UIApplication

Revit UI application used to open container models.

Exceptions

ArgumentNullException

Thrown when doc or uiApp is null.

Methods

FindMissing(ICollection<string>, ICollection<string>, Dictionary<string, string>, Dictionary<string, string>)

Compares the document against predefined resource names and returns the missing items.

public (HashSet<string> Templates, HashSet<string> Schedules, HashSet<string> Families, HashSet<string> Tags) FindMissing(ICollection<string> predefinedTemplates, ICollection<string> predefinedSchedules, Dictionary<string, string> predefinedFamilies = null, Dictionary<string, string> predefinedTags = null)

Parameters

predefinedTemplates ICollection<string>

Expected view template names (non-schedule templates).

predefinedSchedules ICollection<string>

Expected schedule template names.

predefinedFamilies Dictionary<string, string>

Expected family names mapped to file paths. Only the keys (family names) are checked for presence.

predefinedTags Dictionary<string, string>

Expected tag family names mapped to file paths. Only annotation-category families are treated as tags.

Returns

(HashSet<string> Templates, HashSet<string> Schedules, HashSet<string> Families, HashSet<string> Tags)

A tuple of missing resource names: (Templates, Schedules, Families, Tags).

Remarks

View templates are collected from Autodesk.Revit.DB.View elements where Autodesk.Revit.DB.View.IsTemplate is true and the view is not a Autodesk.Revit.DB.ViewSchedule.

Schedule templates are collected from Autodesk.Revit.DB.ViewSchedule elements where Autodesk.Revit.DB.View.IsTemplate is true.

Loaded families/tags are collected from all Autodesk.Revit.DB.FamilySymbol elements in the document. Tags are inferred as families whose symbol category is Autodesk.Revit.DB.CategoryType.Annotation.

LoadFamilies(Dictionary<string, string>, ICollection<string>, Document)

Loads the specified missing family names from disk using a name-to-path map.

public void LoadFamilies(Dictionary<string, string> sourceMap, ICollection<string> missingNames, Document doc)

Parameters

sourceMap Dictionary<string, string>

Map of family name to family file path (.rfa).

missingNames ICollection<string>

Family names to load.

doc Document

Target document into which families should be loaded.

Remarks

This method delegates loading to GetOrLoadFamilySymbols and verifies that each requested name resolves to a non-null symbol entry in the returned dictionary.

Exceptions

InvalidOperationException

Thrown when one or more requested families fail to load.

LoadTemplatesAndSchedulesFromContainer(ContainerSource, ICollection<string>, ICollection<string>)

Copies missing view templates and schedule templates from a container model into the active document.

public void LoadTemplatesAndSchedulesFromContainer(ContainerSource type, ICollection<string> missingTemplates = null, ICollection<string> missingSchedules = null)

Parameters

type ContainerSource

Which container source to use.

missingTemplates ICollection<string>

Names of view templates (non-schedule) to copy.

missingSchedules ICollection<string>

Names of schedule templates to copy.

Remarks

Copy is performed inside a transaction using Autodesk.Revit.DB.ElementTransformUtils.CopyElements(Autodesk.Revit.DB.Document,System.Collections.Generic.ICollection{Autodesk.Revit.DB.ElementId},Autodesk.Revit.DB.Document,Autodesk.Revit.DB.Transform,Autodesk.Revit.DB.CopyPasteOptions).

If the destination document contains non-template schedules with the same names as schedule templates being copied, those destination schedules are renamed with an " - old" suffix prior to copying to avoid name collisions.

Any failures are added to an internal error list and can be displayed via ShowFinalMessages(ICollection<string>, ICollection<string>, ICollection<string>, ICollection<string>).

ShowFinalMessages(ICollection<string>, ICollection<string>, ICollection<string>, ICollection<string>)

Displays a final status message summarizing the operation outcome.

public void ShowFinalMessages(ICollection<string> missingTemplates, ICollection<string> missingSchedules, ICollection<string> missingFamilies, ICollection<string> missingTags)

Parameters

missingTemplates ICollection<string>

The template names requested/considered as missing.

missingSchedules ICollection<string>

The schedule template names requested/considered as missing.

missingFamilies ICollection<string>

The family names requested/considered as missing.

missingTags ICollection<string>

The tag family names requested/considered as missing.

Remarks

If any internal errors were recorded, an error dialog is displayed and the method returns. Otherwise, a success/info dialog is displayed indicating whether anything was loaded.
